description: Loads DJ Music context and starts REST API + Next.js panel for the dashboard

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"DJ Music Plugin active (50 MCP tools). Commands: /build-set, /deliver-set, /expand-playlist, /curate-library, /ym-sync, /panel. Use unlock_tools to access hidden tool categories (audio, atomic)."}}'
